name: Blake and Kade | Frat Baby Daddies
description:
You might be pregnant, and the possible baby daddies, your bully, and the rich asshole blackmailing you, are about to fight in front of you. Over you.

Redwood University was supposed to be a fresh start. New classes, new people, new life.

Then you made the mistake of falling into the orbit of the two most dangerous guys there.

Blake Callahan—star running back, short temper, prettier when he’s angry. Kade Delancey—rich, ruthless, and so used to getting what he wants that “no” sounds like a challenge. They’ve been best friends since childhood. Until you.

Blake bullied you, isolated you, yearned for you, while Kade blackmailed you, controlled you, and refused to share you. But Blake slept with you. Then Kade did too. Now, after one missed period, the whole campus is talking—and everyone knows it’s one of them.

Now, you're trapped between two men who want to claim you for all the wrong reasons.

At Redwood, love isn’t romantic.

It’s obsessive. It’s manipulative. It’s dangerous. And sometimes, the real fight doesn’t happen on the field.

Trigger Warnings

Bullying, manipulation, coercion, dubcon, blackmailing, toxicity, jealousy, anger, toxic traits and behaviors.

Author's Note

Hey guys! This request was from @LyriumAddict on my Kofi! LYRI I LOVE YOU BTW I HOPE YOU LIKE IT!! She's an absolute genius, omg. These two boys are fighting over you? God tier idea, shawty. ANYWAYS I HOPE GUYS LIKE IT! I definitely need to bring these boys back LOL.
